name: Missed 2 months work after ladder fall, how to prove lost wages?

mainEntity.name: Missed 2 months work after ladder fall, how to prove lost wages?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pay stubs, employer note, doctor ok.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Submit pay stubs, tax returns, employer letter**.[4]

W-2s, time sheets show average earnings.

- Doctor work restrictions.
- Job search records.
- Future loss projection.

Comp pays 2/3; sue for more if third-party.

description: Pay stubs, employer note, doctor ok.
